merged_events.event_description: The U.S. Ambassador to Switzerland, Madeleine M. Kunin, was accredited to Liechtenstein as the first U.S. Ambassador, resident at Bern, establishing diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: On February 10, 1997, U.S. Ambassador to Switzerland Madeleine M. Kunin was the first U.S. Ambassador accredited to Liechtenstein, resident at Bern.

merged_events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Liechtenstein. The first U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary (nonresident, based in Bern) presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Madeleine May Kunin, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1997-02-10. Credentials presented: 1997-03-14. Left Bern 1999-08-16.

matched.notes: CSV date 1997-02-10 matches RDCR (Event 0) exactly. POCOM (Event 1) gives 1997-03-14 as the credential presentation date, but per source priority rules RDCR's explicit institutional date takes precedence. Both events refer to the same transition: establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Liechtenstein.
